TRIAL COMMENCED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF KIRK FREEMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS - NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION (SET ONE) GRANTED. DEFENDANT FELICIA VALLERA SHALL PAY SANCTIONS OF $790 TO PLAINTIFF KIRK FREEMAN. THE RESPONSES SHALL BE PROVIDED AND THE SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID WITHIN TEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. PRO TEM JUDGE: MARK SCHREIBER; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew A. Mallet, Esq. of the Law Offices of Kirk B. Freeman, Tel 415.398.1082, appearing for the plaintiff and moving party.
Felicia Vallera, Esq., appearing on her own behalf. (No Card)

The matter was discussed. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF KIRK FREEMAN's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And For Sanctions - No opposition filed. Motion to compel responses to request for production (set one) granted. Defendant Felicia Vallera shall pay sanctions of $790 to Plaintiff Kirk Freeman. The responses shall be provided and the sanctions shall be paid within ten days of notice of this order. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Not reported
(Defendant Felicia Vallera stipulated to the matter being heard by a judge pro tem but left without signing the stipulation. The clerk signed the stipulation on her behalf.)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
